title: Click Download Logs and follow your browser prompts to download the file.

sections.heading: Required Access
sections.body:
To download Atlas Data Federation query logs, you must have
[Project Data Access Read Only](<Project Data Access Read Only>) access to the project or higher.

sections.heading: Procedure
sections.body:
**Atlascli:**Atlas CLITo return logs of the specified Data Federation database for your project using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas dataFederation logs <name> [options]

```To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas dataFederation logs](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-dataFederation-logs).**Api:**Atlas Administration APITo download query logs using the API, send a `GET` request to the
Data Federation `queryLogs.gz` endpoint. To learn more about the API syntax
and options, see [Download Query Logs for One Federated
Database](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-downloadgroupclusteronlinearchivequerylogs).**Ui:**Atlas UITo download query logs:Choose one of the following time periods:* Last 4 Hours

* Last 8 Hours

* Last 12 Hours

* Last 24 Hours

* Custom DateThe downloaded log filename is in the following format:```shell
<federated-database-instance-name>_<start-date>_<end-date>_queries.log.gz
```
